title: Monitoring Unconventional Protein Secretion Using Luminescence and Trapping Approaches
author: Néel, Denus, et al.
materials: SH‐SY5Y cells stably expressing HiBiT‐tagged Tau or GFP
Complete growth medium for SH‐SY5Y cells

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: All data should be reported as mean ± SD and derived from a minimum of three independent biological replicates, each measured in at least triplicate technical wells. Statistical analyses may be performed using two‐way ANOVA followed by Tukey's multiple comparison test. Significant difference is defined as p < 0.05. GraphPad Prism is recommended for graphical representation and statistical analyses as it provides standardized figure formats and reproducible workflows.
